---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement that is not a new backend
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Before filing:
- Please search existing issues and the project roadmap (.planning/ROADMAP.md) to avoid duplicates.
- For new LLM backends, please use the "Backend request" template instead.
-->

## Problem statement

<!--
What problem does this feature solve? Whose problem is it?
Include a concrete user story or scenario where the current gateway falls short.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
Describe what you would like to see. Be as specific as you can:
- Public API surface (new endpoint? new field on an existing endpoint?)
- CLI surface (new command? new flag?)
- Config surface (new env var? new setting?)
- Behavior changes for existing flows
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
What other approaches did you consider? Why did you reject them?
This helps reviewers understand the design space.
-->

## Additional context

<!--
Links to relevant docs, prior art in other gateways, mockups, or related issues.
-->
